name: True Spec Golf - Charlotte
about: True Spec Golf - Charlotte is an indoor golf fitting studio located within the private Intown Golf Club. It features a single, premium fitting bay and utilizes industry-leading launch monitor technology to provide club fittings. The facility offers a brand-agnostic fitting matrix with over 70,000 clubhead and shaft combinations, allowing certified master fitters to find optimal equipment for any golfer. Appointments are required for access to the fitting services.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to a comprehensive matrix of over 70,000 clubhead and shaft combinations
Utilizes industry-leading TrackMan launch monitor technology for precise data
Fitting process led by certified master fitters for expert recommendations
Located at a private club, offering a premium and exclusive experience

food_and_drink.notes: Not mentioned as available on-site. BYOB policy is not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading technology for precise launch and flight data.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your existing clubs for a gap analysis, the fitting is designed to help you find new equipment. The facility provides a wide range of clubheads and shafts for you to test during the session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The provided information does not specify a food and drink policy. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for details on outside food and beverage.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: The provided information does not specify the duration for an 18-hole session. Standard simulator play typically takes 2-3 hours, but this can vary based on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, this venue is not specifically marketed as kid-friendly. It is a premium club fitting and practice studio focused on serious golfers and adult clientele.
